title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 535.100 - Change of judge and venue same as under chapter 517
text:
535.100.  Change of judge and venue same as under chapter 517. — The rights to a change of venue and disqualification of a judge in proceedings under this chapter shall be the same and shall be exercised in the same manner as in proceedings under chapter 517.
(L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
